name: Drongo

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias
this build stacks over +100% attack speed and the sim has NO measured attack-speed cap (calibration checklist 7) — sustained-DPS numbers are optimistic until the cap is measured

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Sky Splitter), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +23.8% on your headline output at minute 15.

augments.name: Smog Therapy
augments.note: assumes the full zone lifetime is stood in; one-beneficiary convention

augments.name: Bring The Boom
augments.note: splash to nearby enemies; multi-target value, no single-target change

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 26 — about 955 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer agrees: within 3% of our best core on one-combo burst. The winrate is earned, not luck.

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 397 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +18% more sustained auto DPS: try Sky Splitter over Lightning Hawk (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 413 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +13% more sustained auto DPS: try Sky Splitter over Lightning Hawk (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 39% of its bite; you give up 29% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite; you give up 29% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.
